mapper.select:
SELECT store_id AS storeId, name, category, address, phone, created_data AS createdData, status FROM store
category = #{category}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY store_id DESC
SELECT store_id AS storeId, name, category, address, phone, created_data AS createdData, status FROM store WHERE store_id = #{store_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store (name, category, address, phone, created_data, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{address}, #{phone}, NOW(), 'OPEN')
mapper.update: UPDATE store SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status} WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
